title: BundleLock
description: Immutable SHA-256-hashed snapshot written at Phase 3 user approval. Per Boundary 4: required for replay determinism. Once status=approved, this file is the source of truth — never modified.

approved_by.description: User identity at moment of approval (git config user.email).

hash.description: SHA-256 of canonical JSON of items[] (matches ContextBundle.hash). Replay must reproduce this exact value.

content_hash.description: SHA-256 of item.content. Per-item hash enables granular drift detection.

items_hash.description: Per-item hash table. Replay verifies each item's content matches its hash.

consumed_by.description: Append-only log of downstream skills that consumed this bundle (sidecar wrapper integration). Optional.
